<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Internal / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes (Biome lint + format)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] e2e (`pnpm test:e2e`) passes if behavior changed
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) for any user-facing change to a published package
- [ ] Updated docs (README / `examples/kitchen-sink`) where relevant
